run.label: vllm-minimax-m27-b70-moe-config-hybrid-bf16-u4-p512-n256
evidence: Log line confirms: Using configuration from /home/steve/bench-results/minimax-m2.7-autoround-vllm/moe-config-hybrid-m1-default-prefill/E=256,N=384,device_name=Intel(R)_Graphics_[0xe223],dtype=int4_w4a16.json for MoE layer.
The default-config warning is gone in this run.
Throughput is below the stronger non-tuned BF16 u4 p512/n256 datapoints, so the B70 config warning is not the current decode bottleneck under the llm-scaler u4 bridge.

conclusion: Do not enable the 2026-05-08 hybrid B70 MoE config by default for current BF16 llm-scaler u4 decode runs. It can reduce the warning and may help older non-bridge/prefill paths, but it did not improve the current p512/n256 decode-style benchmark.
